items.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Suffers a Larger Drop Than the General Market: Key Insights
items.description: In the most recent trading session, Caterpillar (CAT) closed at $707.59, indicating a -1.27% shift from the previous trading day.

items.title: Total Energy Services Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
items.description: Total Energy Services (TSE:TOT) reported record quarterly and annual results for the three and 12 months ended December 31, 2025, as strong demand for natural gas compression and process equipment in North America and higher activity from upgraded equipment in Australia more than offset weaker North

items.title: Norfolk Southern to upgrade dozens of locomotives
items.description: Norfolk Southern and Progress Rail to upgrade 96 DC-traction locomotives to AC, part of a fleet transformation strengthening operations and supporting sustainable shipping. The post Norfolk Southern to upgrade dozens of locomotives appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: Atlas Energy Solutions (AESI) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
items.description: Shares of proppant sand producer Atlas Energy Solutions (NYSE:AESI) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after the company announced it entered into a significant agreement with Caterpillar Inc. to secure approximately $840 million worth of power generation equipment.
